title: Ive been out of the loop so
display_title: Ive been out of the loop so
wikitext:
[]: I've been out of the loop so... Post by Teufel Hunden » Fri Jul 18, 2008 11:17 am What exactly is the premis for rebuild? Is it a remake with slight differences like the manga?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 18, 2008 11:39 am Um, no. It's a remake of the series (adding some new scenes as well as altering old ones) with the promise of a brand new ending for 4. Rebuild 1.0: Episodes 1-6 of the series Prolouge Arc (ends with the Operation Yashima battle) Rebuild 2.0: Episode 7(or more likely, jumping right into 8) through probably episode 19 or so based on the Next Time Preview. Action/Descent Arc of the series. Rebuild 3.0: Most likely episode 20 to 24?? (It'll be interesting to see given all that information Anno added to the Director Cuts episodes.) Based on the Bitter End arc of the series. Will be shown back to back with 4.0, similar to how The End of Evangelion was made up of Air/Love is Destructive and Sincerely Yours/I Need You. Rebuild 4.0: Brand new ending. Bitter End arc.

[]: Post by Teufel Hunden » Fri Jul 18, 2008 2:31 pm that makes more sence, I remember reading about it before I shipped out, and I haven't heard anything about it since I got back. I'm assuming it's already started releasing then? ...and for that matter how do you spell releasing? It looks right but now it's bothering the hell out of me

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 18, 2008 2:56 pm Rebuild 1.01 is out on DVD in Japan and fansub torrents world-wide since late April. Teufel Hunden wrote: ...and for that matter how do you spell releasing? It looks right but now it's bothering the hell out of me

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jul 19, 2008 9:41 pm Deleted the string of OT posts. If nothing further needs to be said, I'll lock the topic.

[]: Post by Evangelion__x » Sun Jul 20, 2008 3:01 am -inbeforelock- I was hoping Rebuild wouldn't be a re-telling of the whole series. Like, continuing with what happened after EoE or something...

[]: Post by V » Sun Jul 20, 2008 6:52 am you can't just cut out a string of posts in which I say "a lot of us suspect Rebuild is a sequel to the original", because you personally disagree with them, Karan

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 20, 2008 1:15 pm V: Ursus deleted those posts because they were off topic and he didn't want this separate thread (topic itself is already mentioned in ANOTHER thread anyway) to get locked if people feel they have something to say here.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 21, 2008 2:17 am There really isn't anything else to say.
